title: Grilled Australian-Style Egg
description: A simple yet delicious breakfast recipe featuring a grilled egg, inspired by Australian flavors.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick skillet or grill pan over medium heat.
Add 1 tsp of butter to the skillet and let it melt.
Crack the egg into the skillet and add the second tsp of butter on top.
Sprinkle salt and pepper to taste.
Let the egg cook for 2-3 minutes, until the whites are set.
Flip the egg over and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the yolk is cooked to your desired doneness.
Serve hot, garnished with additional butter if desired.
